headline: Akamai Earns the Solutions Partner with Certified Software Designation for Security
summary: This designation recognizes Akamai API Security for delivering software solutions compatible with the Microsoft Cloud that demonstrate interoperability and meet program requirementsCAMBRIDGE, Mass., June 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM), a Microsoft partner, today announced it has earned the Solutions Partner* with certified software** designation for API Security within the Microsoft AI Cloud Partner Program. summary: Recent performance snapshot for Akamai Technologies (AKAM) Akamai Technologies (AKAM) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading, with the stock last closing at US$137.81. Investors are weighing this price against its recent returns and current business profile in security and cloud services. See our latest analysis for Akamai Technologies.
